info.description: Learning Management System Backend API with Course, Test, and Student Management
info.title: LMS Backend API

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of test attempts for authenticated student
Retrieve all attempts by user for a specific test

post.description: Begin a new test attempt for authenticated student
Submit answers for a test attempt

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of all attempts for a test series (admin/instructor only)
get.summary: List all attempts for a test

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific test attempt

post.description: Manually evaluate and score an attempt (admin only)

get.description: Retrieve detailed results and evaluation of a completed attempt
Retrieve score and percentage for a completed attempt

post.description: Change the password for the authenticated user
Authenticate user with email and password, returns access and refresh tokens
Logout the current user (revokes tokens on client side)

get.description: Retrieve information about the authenticated user

patch.description: Update user profile information (first name, last name, phone, profile picture)

post.description: Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token
Create a new user account with email and password

get.description: Check if an access token is valid and get user information from it
Retrieve paginated list of courses with optional filters

post.description: Create a new course (faculty/admin only)

get.description: Retrieve total number of courses in the system
Retrieve paginated list of courses for a specific instructor
Retrieve paginated list of published courses
Search for courses by title or description
Retrieve course details using course slug
Retrieve detailed information about a specific course

post.description: Archive a published course (faculty/admin only)

get.description: Retrieve list of students enrolled in a course (faculty/admin only)

patch.description: Set a course as featured or remove featured status (admin only)

get.description: Retrieve all lessons in a course across all modules
Retrieve all modules for a course with their lessons

post.description: Publish a draft course (faculty/admin only)

get.description: Get paginated list of courses enrolled by authenticated student
Get paginated list of all enrollments for a course (admin/instructor only)
Get statistics for course enrollments (admin/instructor only)

post.description: Enroll authenticated student in a course

delete.description: Remove authenticated student enrollment from a course

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific enrollment

post.description: Mark an enrollment as completed

patch.description: Update progress percentage for an enrollment

get.description: Retrieve global leaderboard ranking all users by test scores and performance
Retrieve leaderboard for a specific course showing student progress and completion
Retrieve leaderboard for a specific test showing scores and rankings
Check if a specific feature is enabled in the current license
Get all features enabled in the current license
Check if the license system is functioning correctly
Get the maximum number of users allowed by the license

post.description: Force an immediate refresh of the license verification cache

get.description: Get current license status, expiry, and enabled features

post.description: Verify the current license with the license server

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of live sessions with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by status (scheduled, active, completed, cancelled)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Create a new live session (faculty/admin only)

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific live session

delete.description: Cancel a scheduled live session (faculty/admin only, creator only)

patch.description: Update live session details (faculty/admin only, creator only)

post.description: Join an active live session

get.description: Get LiveKit token for joining live session with video/audio
Retrieve paginated list of test series with optional filters

post.description: Create a new test/quiz (faculty/admin only)

get.description: Retrieve total number of test series in the system
Retrieve paginated list of published test series
Search for test series by title or description
Retrieve test series details using slug
Retrieve detailed information about a specific test series

delete.description: Delete an existing test series (admin only)

patch.description: Update an existing test series (faculty/admin only)

post.description: Create a copy of an existing test series with all its questions (faculty/admin only)
Publish a draft test series (faculty/admin only)

get.description: Retrieve all questions for a test series with pagination
Retrieve statistics for a test series (attempts, pass rate, etc.)
Get paginated list of all users (admin only)

post.description: Create a new user account (admin only)
Import multiple users from a CSV file (admin only)

get.description: Retrieve total number of users in the system (admin only)
Get paginated list of users filtered by role (admin only)
Search for users by name or email (admin only)
Retrieve detailed information about a specific user

patch.description: Update user details (user can update own profile, admin can update any profile)

post.description: Activate a deactivated user account (admin only)
Deactivate a user account (admin only)
Reset password for a user account (admin only)

Bearer.description: "Add a JWT token to the header with ** Bearer <JWT> ** token to authorize"
Bearer.name: Authorization
